title: Shandia’s Claim to the Land
description: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
scene: Across pages 15, this scene centers on Luffy, Enel, Gan Fall, Wyper, Sanji. After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
